name: Ana
text: The coin. The photograph. And Perica's fish.

name: Ana
text: I haven't felt this clear in months.

name: Ana
text: The fisherman. His grandfather. He was one of the twelve.

name: Ana
text: He was the first one who said yes. Before anyone else.

name: Ana
text: We had nothing, you know. Not even a proper plan.

name: Ana
text: Just this coin. We buried it the day we started.

name: Ana
text: Said it would bring luck to whatever we built.
